title: Verify graceful handling when APIs for Trial Corner data fail to load
description: Tests the system's behavior when backend services for the Trial Corner are unavailable.
preconditions: User is in the target cohort.
Network interception tool is used to simulate a server error for the Trial Corner data API.

steps.description: 1. Log in and land on the homepage.
2. Enable network interception to force a server error response for the Trial Corner API.

expected_result: The application does not crash. A user-friendly error message is displayed (e.g., 'Could not load your trial information. Please try again later.') or the page shows loading skeletons.
